final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style cover image (vertical, 9-grid compatible) for a 素人 creator post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical single-frame designed to fit within a 九宫格 layout; central title text prominent in the middle
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, naturally held or displayed by a casual everyday person (素人 vibe)
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, lifestyle-oriented backdrop — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable everyday atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful 小红书 direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered, primary title); font must feel cute and differentiated — exact typeface execution is yours
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 vertical format; title text must be clearly legible at center
Avoid: overly polished commercial photography look; avoid professional studio aesthetic
